REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (199 Bocana St. S.F.)
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $650,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: J. Chien.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for San Francisco Public Administrator. Alma Sook and Joseph Ferrucci for and with Gloria Pettersson and for Heirs in Sweden. Katharine Hollund (Realtor) was also present.

The Court stated that the Public Administrator had priority. Ms. Beck expressed concern about the manner in which the Public Administrator will sell the property, the length of time it would take them to sell and whether the Public Administrator would take the necessary steps/make repairs to ensure that the property sells for the highest dollar amount. Mr. Weinkauff stated that the Public Administrator was not waiving priority, that it would follow direction of the Court as to what needs to be done to the property regarding improvements and that it was the Public Administrator's practice to follow the recommendations of their Broker. The Court encouraged the Parties to work toghether and discuss what improvements would increase benefit to the Estate. The Court appointed the Public Administrator (subject to a written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Continued To Apr-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
